narrative:
Precinct Fostoria 3-A (precinct in Seneca County) has 762 registered voters, with 68.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
